description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a walled rectangular plot, featuring a flat roof design with blue and white color accents. The structure is composed of two main volumes, with the larger section housing the main living spaces and a smaller, detached garage or utility building. The property includes a driveway, a landscaped front yard with green grass, and a backyard area with outdoor seating, circular decorative elements, and palm trees. Large windows and sliding doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The perimeter is enclosed by a solid fence, and the entrance is marked by a gate leading to the driveway. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with blue and white accents, set in a walled plot with landscaped yards, a driveway, and outdoor seating. The design features large windows, a detached garage, and a clean, geometric layout.
description_view_0: From this view, the main entrance, driveway, and front yard with green grass and a solid perimeter fence are visible, along with the blue-roofed garage and main building.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the backyard with outdoor seating, circular decorative elements, and palm trees, as well as the asymmetrical window arrangement on the main facade.
description_view_2: The side view shows the detached garage, the expanse of the backyard, and the connection between the main building and the outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: From the rear, the solid fence, green lawn, and the back of the garage and main building are visible, emphasizing the enclosed and private nature of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
